data.descriptionShort: Step up the intensity in just 20 minutes a day with dynamic cardio moves.

modules.categories: Cardio, Slim & Sculpt, Bodyweight Training, Recovery, Weight Loss

modules.title: Is Transform :20 Right For Me?
modules.content: It's you, Shaun T, and a Step, 6 days a week for 6 weeks. After 5 minutes, you'll be out of breath, at 10 minutes you'll be sweating, in 15 minutes you'll be looking at the clock, and by minute 20 you'll be done and proud of yourself. With a new workout every day, you’ll never do the same routine twice.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Unique daily workouts will scorch calories and target your core, legs, glutes and upper body with no breaks and no weights required. The 6 weeks are broken into 3 chapters, Commit, Climb, Conquer, each for 2 weeks. There are 2 bonus workouts per chapter, and 6 bonus workouts with weights if you love to lift while you step.

modules.title: Empowering Tools for Mind and Body
modules.content: You only need a Step, your body and the will to work. The program comes with the Beachbody Nutrition Guide, a 6-Week Transformation Tracker, Dry-Erase Wall Calendar/Tracker, Get Started Guide and Transformer Step Stickers to show off your hard work after you conquer each chapter.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
